feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Hale Blood, Stilinski Chaos, Dutton Country
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,542Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Stilinski & Hale family hit the Dutton Ranch and nothing stays calm for long. Isabelle draws attention she didn’t ask for, Peter gets possessive in record time, Derek decides bull riding is a personality now, and Stiles is 50% concern, 50% distracted appreciation. Beth Dutton stirs chaos like it’s cardio, Rip judges everyone equally, and John Dutton tries to keep the peace while slowly realizing that’s not happening. Cowboys, wolves, tension, and absolutely no emotional safety in sight.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The nogitsune
entry.summary:
Author: UrNewtmas_ObsessedGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,700Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 106

Summary: When Stiles goes missing for three weeks and suddenly shows up at the loft, there's something off. His scent. Everything. And when his eyes glow gold instead of his usual brown, Derek knows something is horribly wrong. I suck at summary's.Tags will be updated as the story gets updated.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 132,464Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 280

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride — so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous — and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

entry.title: Inchoate
entry.summary:
Author: milkyway

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,222Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 13

Summary: After Derek is cursed, the most vulnerable version of himself emerges during a late-night grocery run. In the fluorescent quiet of a nearly empty supermarket, Stiles must convince the man he loves that he is finally safe.

entry.title: I've been Searching (For Something Sweet) - Rewrite
entry.summary:
Author: CluelessInWhite

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,536Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 56

Summary: Stiles hasn't been back in Beacon Hills for a long time. Hasn't seen the Hale Pack. Not since before it was the Hale pack, when they were just a ragtag bunch of teenagers trying to save the world.A lot has changed in the years between them. Too much change to have any room for forgiveness. Stiles hasn't felt like the bitter 18 year old he was in a long time either, but he supposes time can only change you so much before it becomes full circle.

entry.title: You're My Ideal
entry.summary:
Author: riley_silverhart

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,917Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: Stiles buries his head into his boyfriends waist before mumbling, “You know two years ago I thought it was sexy you were building us a house. Now I’m reconsidering if it’s really even worth it. I mean I could probably get used to having to share a bathroom with Jackson and Lydia’s million beauty products. It’s probably not that bad, everyone looks so cozy sharing the couch anyway. What do we even need a house for, or so many rooms, or lamps, and base board moulding, cabinet handles, –”.  Stiles would’ve kept complaining, he had plenty items to list from the never ending to-do Lydia keeps giving him. But he found it hard to stay annoyed with his boyfriend's hand in his hair and feeling the deep rumble in his chest as he laughed at Stiles' misfortune.    OR: Stiles gets a little discouraged when working on the new Hale house and Derek takes a trip down memory lane.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,275Chapters: 14/40Kudos: 38

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 89,627Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 33

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

entry.summary:
Author: ForgottenOne201

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,249Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 135

entry.title: Surrounded by darkness
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,576Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: I would like to point out that English is not my native language.After the fight with Donovan, Stiles falls with him and loses his sight. Scott and the pack turn their backs on him, believing Theo's lies. Theo actually wants nothing more than to push them away so he can have the boy all to himself. Stiles is depressed and doesn't know what to do with his life. All his dreams have vanished, and now he must accept his new condition. Will anyone help him?

entry.title: Someone Else's Tupperware
entry.summary:
Author: ModeratelyScathed

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,695Chapters: 2/7Kudos: 49

Summary: The funny thing is, Stiles actually has no idea who just climbed through his window. Doesn't really care, either. All he wants to do is catch a few hours of uninterrupted sleep before the nightmares drag him back to consciousness.Again.Still, he expects some sort of snarky response if it's Derek or Peter. Or maybe the vocal embodiment of Scott's puppy dog eyes if it's his best friend.He doesn't expect several seconds of silence.And he definitely doesn't expect the sudden and unmistakable thump of a body hitting the ground.

entry.title: Enough to Make Me Feel Supernatural
entry.summary:
Author: nixeleth

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 95,424Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 36

Summary: The problem with finding someone on Grindr wasn’t that he was demisexual—the problem was that fourteen years ago, Stiles had basically imprinted on one surly teenager over a "stolen" sandwich cookie, and he’d never really gotten over that. Honestly, it was like something out of one of his own romance novels, except without werewolves.

entry.title: The Beacon Hills Pack House (or, Four Grown Men and a Baby Wolf)
entry.summary:
Author: Owl_actually_writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,077Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Two years after the war with the Hunters ended, Stiles and Derek are married, Scott and Isaac are living in their guest rooms, and Liam has unofficially (officially) been adopted by the entire chaotic pack. It’s a full house. Between Stiles’ FBI remote work, Derek’s surprising skill as a stay-at-home-werewolf-husband, and Scott trying to ignore that he’s still hopelessly in love with his ex-boyfriend Isaac, something’s got to give. Tonight, it does. Or: The one where Scott finally stops being a martyr and takes what he wants, Liam accidentally walks in on something he can't un-see, and Derek and Stiles have the most normal marriage in Beacon Hills—which is saying something.

entry.title: His Mythical Anchor
entry.summary:
Author: Hunters_core

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,743Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 14

Summary: What happens if Stiles is the one who gets bitten instead of Scott, not by a werewolf but a vampire. And how best friend Scott becomes a werewolf on his own accord just to help his friend. But the twist is, was Stiles just an ordinary person? Nope, he wasn't. He just needed the right moment and a little push to awaken that hidden power growing inside of him.

entry.title: Remember me
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,668Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 48

Summary: The other teen raised an inquisitive eyebrow at him when Scott called his name, looking entirely surprised that Scott even knew it. Both of the teenagers looked past Scott's shoulder, where the pack was standing united, trying their best not to overwhelm Stiles but anxiously waiting for him to acknowledge them. Maybe with a hug? It had been a long time. "Do you know these people?" the girl inclined her head and whispered into his ear. Her question earned a casual shrug from Stiles, who whispered back a flat, "No."
